data.title: AL_SEASON showcases 26 Korean craft artists with ADÈLE Collections in Paris, running through Sept. 30.
data.description: In Paris, the event "Gyeol – Where the Light Lingers" by AL_SEASON features ADÈLE Collections, displaying the works of 26 Korean craft artists until September 30th.

data.title: Weekly recap of 13 consumer press releases: Ariana Grande's 2 fragrances, Target's biggest Circle Week, and Miley Cyrus revamping Maybelline jingle.
data.description: This week, significant updates in consumer and retail were made public via PR Newswire. Noteworthy mentions include the launch of two fragrances by Ariana Grande inspired by the musical Wicked, Target's record-breaking Circle Week, and Miley Cyrus's reinterpretation of the classic Maybelline jingle. The report came out on September 26, 2025, marking an eventful period in the industry.

data.title: Akto introduces Agentic Security Platform to safeguard enterprises from AI agent threats in the age of autonomous agents.
data.description: Today in San Francisco, Akto revealed the introduction of the Agentic Security Platform, a comprehensive security solution tailored for the era of autonomous AI agents. This platform is specifically crafted to safeguard enterprises during the widespread implementation of AI agents and the adoption of the Model Context.

data.title: "Highlights 12 important press releases, including 2026 college rankings and new products from Urban Outfitters and Dunkin'. NEW YORK, Sept. 26, 2025."
data.description: In the ever-changing landscape of higher education, a comprehensive list of the top colleges for the year 2026 has been released. This information comes to us through an innovative AI-powered platform recently launched by PR Newswire. Alongside this, a fresh collaboration between Urban Outfitters and Dunkin' has also been announced. The news was made public in New York on September 26, 2025, demonstrating the continuous flow of new and exciting developments. In today's fast-paced world, keeping abreast of the latest trends and updates can be a challenge, particularly with the vast amount of information being disseminated.

data.title: Hyperscale Data commences significant build-out at Michigan campus to power NVIDIA Blackwell AI infrastructure.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Las Vegas, Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS), a versatile holding entity, revealed the initiation of the conversion process for a segment of space and power at its Michigan Data Center. This move reflects an important advancement for the Company, showcasing its strategic efforts to optimize operations and infrastructure.

data.title: Sanctuary Wealth adds Cedar Cove Wealth Partners from Thrivent Advisor Network. Elite financial advisors join the network.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Miami, Sanctuary Wealth announced the addition of Cedar Cove Wealth Partners to its network. Sanctuary provides elite financial advisors with opportunities for growth and success in an ever-changing industry. Cedar Cove, an independent firm previously based in (location not mentioned), will now be a part of Sanctuary's expanding network.

data.title: Cure Alzheimer's Fund gets $50 million gift from The Cardinal Family Fund, largest in its 20-year history.
data.description: In Wellesley Hills, Massachusetts, on September 26, 2025, the non-profit organization Cure Alzheimer's Fund (CureAlz) revealed a groundbreaking development. The organization received a record-breaking donation of $50 million from The Cardinal Family Fund. This contribution stands as the largest in CureAlz's 20-year history, marking a significant milestone for the organization's mission to combat Alzheimer's disease.

data.title: IDEAYA Biosciences grants inducements, Sept. 25, 2025, under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). NASDAQ: IDYA.
data.description: In South San Francisco, California, on September 26, 2025, IDEAYA Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDYA), a company specializing in precision medicine for oncology, revealed that its Compensation Committee made a significant announcement on September 25, 2025. The committee's decision is part of IDEAYA's dedication to the research and creation of targeted therapeutics.

data.title: Colossal's 2nd Annual Baby of the Year competition is open for voting, raising millions for charity.
data.description: In Phoenix on September 26, 2025, Colossal, a top professional fundraiser in the U.S. known for generating millions in charitable donations, excitedly unveils the launch of Baby of the Year 2025. The event is introduced by a prominent actress, entrepreneur, and dedicated Baby2Baby Board member.

data.title: Johnson Outdoors (Nasdaq: JOUT) announces quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per Class A share and $0.30 per Class B share.
data.description: Johnson Outdoors Inc., a prominent outdoor recreation equipment and technology innovator, headquartered in Racine, Wisconsin, disclosed today that their Board of Directors has sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend for their shareholders. The approved dividend amounts to $0.33 per Class A share and $0.30 per Class B share. The company trades on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol JOUT.

data.title: RadNet, Inc. execs to present at Jefferies Healthcare Services Conference on Sep 29, 2025 at 1:50 pm CT (11:50 am PT).
data.description: On September 26, 2025, RadNet, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDNT), a prominent provider of diagnostic imaging services through a network of outpatient centers, revealed that its CEO, Dr. Howard Berger, and CFO, Mark Stolper, are set to speak at the Jefferies Healthcare Services Conference. This event is scheduled for Monday, September 29, 2025, at 1:50 p.m. Central Time (11:50 a.m. Pacific Time). RadNet is recognized for its high-quality and cost-effective services across the nation.

data.title: Ragnarok Idle Adventure Plus gets ISBN code approved by Chinese govt. (NasdaqGM: GRVY) disclosed on Sep 24, 2025.
data.description: Gravity Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), a South Korean developer and publisher of online and mobile games, disclosed in Seoul on September 26, 2025, that their game Ragnarok Idle Adventure Plus, known as 仙境 传说: 梦 想天空 in Chinese, has been issued an ISBN code by the Chinese government on September 24, 2025. This Vertical Idle MMORPG game has received official recognition and approval for its distribution.

data.title: OMS Energy CEO How Meng Hock speaks at DFIN event for Southeast Asian companies considering US IPO, post successful Nasdaq listing.
data.description: OMS Energy Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: OMSE), a manufacturer of surface wellhead systems and oil country tubular goods for the oil and gas sector, shared that its CEO, Mr. How Meng Hock, has been invited as a prominent panelist at Donnelley Financial Solutions’ event catered to Southeast Asian firms contemplating a public listing. This event, titled “Inside the C-Suite: Real Stories on U.S. IPO & Public Listing,” follows OMS's recent accomplishment of getting listed on Nasdaq. This move highlights the Company’s dominance in the region and industry.
